Video.summary: A miner and an assayer try to short-circuit a mine owner's plans to corner the market.
Video.title: The Red Flannel Shirt

Video.summary: A captain tries to clear a trading post owner accused of selling ammunition to the enemy.
Video.title: A Bullet for the Captain

Video.summary: A phony newspaper item sparks a gold rush.
Video.title: Gold Lake

Video.summary: A horsewoman puts a dent in a circus owner's plans to hire another equestrienne.
Video.title: Pioneer Circus

Video.summary: The Rosetti family and fellow Italian immigrants look forward to new freedoms in the American West.
Video.title: The Invaders

Video.summary: An injured man harbors ill intent for the trading post owners offering him shelter.
Video.title: Valley of Danger

Video.summary: When valuable items disappear, Maj. Bullock suspects Charlie Stoner.
Video.title: Fair Exchange

Video.summary: A marshal takes on a mission to retrieve a stolen wedding dress while an outlaw gang runs wild.
Video.title: A Wedding Dress

Video.summary: Indians attack on a wedding night.
Video.title: Pete Kitchen's Wedding Night

Video.summary: A widow's ranch is requisitioned by the Union Army, making her the target of Confederate cavalrymen.
Video.title: Splinter Station

Video.summary: A teacher steps in when an outlaw influences a youngster.
Video.title: Learnin' at Dirty Devil

Video.summary: A man seeking to open a saloon turns to Harry Bassett, Wyatt Earp and Bat Masterson for help.
Video.title: Extra Guns

Video.summary: Fighting corrupt lawmen and vigilantes.
As the Donner Party attempts to cross the Sierra Nevada Mountains, and the Reed family is banished.
Video.title: A Girl Named Virginia

Video.summary: A drama about the working conditions in a mining town.
Video.title: City of Widows

Video.summary: Yvonne DeCarlo plays a doctor struggling to begin a medical practice as a woman in the 1890s.
Video.title: The Lady Was an M.D.

Video.summary: Matt Denby faces severe bad luck: his son is bitten by a rabid animal and his wife leaves him.
Video.title: The Madstone

Video.summary: A ghost-plagued woman hires a detective to take her and her fortune to San Francisco.
Video.title: South of Horror Flats

Video.summary: A tenderfoot teams with a prospector who is quick to live up to his reputation as a jinx.
Video.title: Gamble with Death

Video.summary: Dr. Allen Camden investigates the murder of likeable shopkeeper Grant Noble.
Video.title: Dead Man's Tale

Video.summary: A group of religious settlers tangles with outlaws who have set up an illegal tollgate.
Video.title: Dangerous Crossing

Video.summary: Lawyer William Thorne defends an innocent woman threatened by bigotry and mob violence.
Video.title: Death Ride

Video.summary: A con artist boasts he owns most of San Francisco, but a chemist aims to expose him.
Video.title: The Stolen City

Video.summary: Trappers look for an escape when they're imprisoned by the Mexican governor of San Diego.
Video.title: Price of a Passport

Video.summary: The end of the Mexican-American War leads to disputes between land-owning families and new settlers.
Video.title: Perilous Refuge

Video.summary: A doctor, ostracized after allowing a patient to die, gets a chance at redemption.
Video.title: The Scalpel and the Gun

Video.summary: A miner discovers a vein rich in ore near his claim after giving half of his stake to a singer.
Video.title: Ten Feet of Nothing

Video.summary: A merchant looking to make more money fabricates reports of snowfall cutting off local supply lines.
Video.title: White Gold

Video.summary: A recent widower wants a headstone.
Video.title: The Lone Grave

Video.summary: A tomboy changes her ways when she meets the handsome constable of a mining town.
Video.title: The Indiana Girl

Video.summary: A miner invests his life savings on a tip from a dying criminal.
Video.title: The Secret of the Black Prince

Image.alt: The Secret of the Black Prince
The Secret of the Black Prince
The Secret of the Black Prince
The Secret of the Black Prince
The Secret of the Black Prince
The Secret of the Black Prince
The Secret of the Black Prince
The Secret of the Black Prince
The Secret of the Black Prince

Video.summary: A Dakota wife left on her own becomes the unwilling servant of two opportunistic highwaymen.
Video.title: The Sage Hen

Video.summary: A woman's love inspires an aspiring preacher to stand up to a bully.
Video.title: The Other Cheek

Video.summary: Sandy King, the youngest member of an outlaw gang, is wounded.
Video.title: A Mule... Like the Army's Mule

Image.alt: A Mule... Like the Army's Mule
A Mule... Like the Army's Mule
A Mule... Like the Army's Mule
A Mule... Like the Army's Mule
A Mule... Like the Army's Mule
A Mule... Like the Army's Mule
A Mule... Like the Army's Mule
A Mule... Like the Army's Mule
A Mule... Like the Army's Mule

Video.summary: Citizens gather to watch a man make good on his claim that his horse can swim the Catalina Channel.
Video.title: The World's Greatest Swimming Horse

Video.summary: Renegade Natives led by a white man named Clay threaten the residents of a decommissioned fort.
Video.title: Long Night at Fort Lonely

Video.summary: A physician courts disaster by aiding one of two feuding Natives.
Video.title: The Lady Doctor

Video.summary: A young man hunts for gold, hoping to impress his girl so she'll accept his proposal.
Video.title: The Mezcla Man

Video.summary: Maso and Okei, tea growers in Gold Hills, encounter both friendship and racism from the locals.
Video.title: The Dragon of Gold Hill

Video.summary: A loveless woman baker decides to leave, causing her town to lose its only pie supplier.
Video.title: The Solid Gold Pie

Video.summary: A gambler is determined to collect his poker winnings: half of Tombstone, Arizona.
Video.title: The Duke of Tombstone

Video.summary: A land manager tries to outfox two women attempting to rightfully claim their property.
Video.title: By the Book

Video.summary: Tiger Lil tries to leave her dance hall days behind her, but Frank Johnson won't give up on her.
Video.title: Lady with a Past
